title: Specific Ricoh MFP and Printer Products - Buffer overflow vulnerability(CVE-2024-47939) in M C2001
explanation: Ricoh has identified a buffer overflow vulnerability(CVE-2024-47939) affecting M C2001
affect: Receiving a crafted request by a remote third party can lead to a denial of service (DoS) attack or changes to some device settings.

models.name: M C2001
models.version: Web Support :2.01 or earlier, WebUapl:2.01 or earlier, Printer:2.01 or earlier

checkVersion:
How to view the firmware version:
1. Access Web Image Monitor from your browser.
https://"IP address or hostname of the device"
2. Log in with Administrator privileges.
3. Navigate to Device Management > Configuration > Device Settings > Firmware Update
measures: Please download the updated firmware at the following link: https://support.ricoh.com/bb/html/dr_ut_e/rcn1/model/mc2001/mc2001.htm?lang=en
contact: Please contact your local Ricoh representative or dealer if you have any queries.

history.changes: Updated CVSSv3 base score and Potential impact

authenticityGuarantee: Please note that any copy or paraphrase of the text of this document that differs in content from the distribution URL link, or omits the URL, is an uncontrolled copy and may lack important information or contain factual errors.
